C

checkActiveProjectiles() - Static method in class io.github.fiitgame.Listeners.EventListener
Method that checks for non-active projectiles and deletes all of their kind
ClassSelectScreen - Class in io.github.fiitgame.Screens
Game starting screen, where player can chose what class he wants to play
ClassSelectScreen(Game) - Constructor for class io.github.fiitgame.Screens.ClassSelectScreen
 
collides(Rectangle) - Method in class io.github.fiitgame.Projectiles.Projectile
Method that checks if the projectile collides with an enemy by checking if their bounding rectangles overlap.
CoolDownException - Exception Class in io.github.fiitgame.Exceptions
Exception, that is being thrown when player attack is on cooldown
